name: CanAlaska Uranium Ltd.
description: CanAlaska Uranium Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and exploration of high-grade uranium deposits in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. The company holds interests in approximately 350,000 hectares (865,000 acres) of land, making it one of the largest landholders in the region. CanAlaska utilizes a project generator model, partnering with major mining companies like Cameco and Denison Mines to advance its diverse portfolio. In addition to its primary uranium focus, the company maintains properties prospective for nickel, copper, gold, and diamonds.
